title: Q QXUNMU Rose&Lemon Cologne Car Air Fresheners 3 Pack-Birdcage Diffuser Scent Booster,Premium Car Accessories for Women/Men,Long-Lasting Auto Perfume Deodorant for Cars/Home/Bathroom,Gift Idea (750g)
features: Car Air Fresheners Adjustable Intensity & Long-Lasting:Everyone has different sensitivity to scents—adjust intensity as needed. Use 2–3 bottles for a stronger effect. Each 3-pack lasts up to 90+ days, depending on room size and ventilation

Solid Design, Spill-Free & Cup Holder Friendly：Solid paste air freshener delivers a steady, long-lasting scent without spills. Generous capacity reduces refill frequency. Base diameter: 5.6cm—please check your car’s cup holder size
Natural & Safe Fragrance:Made from natural pure plant extracts. Gentle, non-irritating formula safe for everyone, including pregnant women, children, and the elderly
4 Scents Options to Suit All Tastes:Includes zesty Lemon, elegant Cologne, soothing Lavender and romantic Rose. Effectively neutralises odours and fills your space with long-lasting natural fragrance
Versatile for Any Setting or Gift：Ideal for use in cars, homes, offices, hotels, shops or bathrooms. A great gift for men, women, friends or colleagues—perfect for birthdays, holidays, or giveaways

Elegant Gift Box with Reusable Birdcage Bottle：Comes in a charming gift box with three fragrances and a fun birdcage-shaped bottle. Refill or reuse the bottle for décor or DIY scent blends—eco-friendly and playful
